metadata.no_auto_align_reason: r01 completed standalone TrackCenter immediately before this pODMR at 38.629 kcps; use the fresh tracked position directly and avoid hidden target reselection.

analysis_plan.notes: No automatic fit request is included in this bridge job. Review raw export/plots first; only fit/use a center after signal presence is supported.

metadata.frequency_window_reason: Screen +/-50 MHz around expected ms=+1 resonance near 3.875 GHz for magnetic-field alignment candidate triage.
metadata.low_points_reason: 21 points gives 5 MHz spacing and stays within a low-point alignment-screen style; not a precision center extraction.
metadata.shot_reason: Use 2 x 40000 repetitions as a bounded strong-pi alignment screen after a fresh 38.629 kcps TrackCenter; this is triage, not precision spectroscopy.
comparison_targets: r01 TrackCenter passed with final_counts_kcps=38.629 at the fresh tracked position.
